calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-09-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Trinity Capital Corporation.
Declaration of Plaintiff's Witness: Ernest Knowles in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: 3rd Ray Enterprises dba 3rd Ray Consulting and Rama Arya as follows:
Principal $51,689.17
Interest $23,887.92
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $273.00, for a total of $78,350.09.
Plaintiff is entitled to the leased quipment described in Exhibit 1 attached to the Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
